model.description: Entity model to use for building this snapshot.

condition.description: Query condition to use for building this snapshot.

timeoutMillis.description: The maximum time to wait in milliseconds for the query to complete.

limit.description: The maximum number of rows to return.

trackingRead.description: When true and this search runs inside an active transaction, the entities it returns are recorded into the transaction's read-set so commit-time first-committer-wins validates them. Defaults to false. Ignored outside a transaction.
